subcodes.first_line: O ye companions of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Rustam, the benevolent, hath bowed his head in humble submission at the threshold of the All-Merciful and hath departed from the realm of mystery [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء رستم مهربان در آستان رحمن سر بخاک نیاز نهاد و از عالم راز
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
